Our Services

Automation Services
for UK Manufacturers

Duke Control Systems delivers turnkey automation engineering across automotive, FMCG, logistics and process manufacturing. We design, integrate, and commission robust systems that improve throughput, safety, and long-term maintainability.

Core Services

What We Deliver

01 · Service

PLC Control Systems

Siemens, Rockwell, Mitsubishi and Schneider. Control logic, safety systems and HMI/SCADA integration.

View Service →
02 · Service

Robot Programming

ABB, FANUC, KUKA and Yaskawa across welding, handling, assembly, palletising and inspection.

View Service →
03 · Service

Electrical Design

E-PLAN and AutoCAD schematics, panel layouts, cable schedules and installation drawings.

View Service →
04 · Service

Conveyor Automation

PLC-controlled conveyor systems integrated with robotics, packaging and end-of-line automation.

View Service →
05 · Service

Virtual Commissioning

Process Simulate digital twin validation — resolve issues offline before site begins.

View Service →
06 · Service

Robotic Palletising

Fully integrated end-of-line systems with custom end-effectors and conveyor integration.

View Service →
Why Choose Duke

The Engineering Partner
Manufacturers Trust

50+ Years Combined Experience

Senior engineers — not graduates — on every project. Deep technical expertise and proven project management skills.

Vendor Neutral Approach

We work with all leading PLC and robot platforms. We recommend what's right for your process, not what's convenient for us.

Integrity & Reliability

We do exactly what we say we will do, when we say we will do it. Our reputation is built on keeping our word.

Full Lifecycle Support

From design and panel build through commissioning to long-term support — one partner, one point of contact.

Birmingham Based, UK Nationwide

City centre location means we're well placed to reach manufacturers quickly anywhere in the UK.

Free Production Line Review

Independent expert eyes on your line at no cost. No obligation — just clear, practical recommendations.
